div.class: alert alert-info py-1 mb-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

span.class: badge rounded-pill bg-success-light text-success fw-bold px-3

div.span: BiziShip account not connected. Please to enable all features.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between o_horizontal_separator mb-2 mt-0
alert alert-warning py-1 mt-1 mb-2 d-flex align-items-center
div.span: This address appears to be residential. Consider checking "Residential Pickup/Delivery".

button.name: action_biziship_uncheck_all_origin
button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-muted ms-2 p-0 text-nowrap
button.invisible: not biziship_origin_residential and not biziship_origin_liftgate and not biziship_origin_limited_access and not biziship_origin_accessorial_ids

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between o_horizontal_separator mb-2 mt-0
alert alert-warning py-1 mt-1 mb-2 d-flex align-items-center
div.span: This address appears to be residential. Consider checking "Residential Pickup/Delivery".

button.name: action_biziship_uncheck_all_dest
button.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-muted ms-2 p-0 text-nowrap
button.invisible: not biziship_dest_appointment and not biziship_dest_residential and not biziship_dest_notify and not biziship_dest_limited_access and not biziship_dest_liftgate and not biziship_dest_hazmat and not biziship_dest_accessorial_ids

div.style: white-space: nowrap; display: flex; align-items: baseline;

field.name: biziship_special_instructions
field.placeholder: Enter special instructions for the carrier (e.g. fragile, call before delivery)...

div.div: Book the Best Rate in Seconds.

div.class: alert alert-info py-1 mb-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

span.class: badge rounded-pill bg-success-light text-success fw-bold px-3

button.name: action_delete_biziship_booking
button.title: Delete Booking Details
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete these booking details?

button.name: action_delete_biziship_quotes
button.title: Delete All Quotes
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all quotes?

span.class: badge rounded-pill bg-success text-white px-2 py-1

button.name: action_open_biziship_quote_confirm
button.title: Please select a quote first to submit it.
